name: Human-Evolution-Game
description: Human Evolution is a unique and innovative human evolution casual parkour game. Join the fight by increasing the number of people or boosting the glass doors of the year and collecting companions on the road! Be careful to avoid the tricky obstacles on the road. Reach the end, defeat all the enemies and victory is yours! Come join us, expand and grow your crowd and defeat the enemies!
tags: 3D, Boy, Fight, Gun, Kid, Killing, Platform
